title: Crispy Medu Vada | Vada Recipes | South Indian Vada | Breakfast Recipes | Indian Breakfast
description: 📌 Crispy & tasty vadas 😋 👉https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLFhw-Rie62rSKrCS3IhNb-MgDBqHLrJQN 📌 Easy South Indian Breakfast Ideas: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLFhw-Rie62rTOl4dyFx68JSvuKawx-tH_ ▶ Next Recipe: https://youtu.be/bM_8f9flSbE Crispy Medu Vada is a classic South Indian breakfast recipe that is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside. This traditional vada recipe is perfect for breakfast or tiffin and pairs well with coconut chutney and sambar.
ingredients: Urad Dal - 1 cup (soaked) | Water - about 1/4 cup | Salt - 1/2 tsp | Onion - 1 no. (finely chopped) | Green Chili - 2 nos. (finely chopped)
instructions: Soak the urad dal for 4 hrs | Strain the water and transfer the urad dal to a mixer jar. | Add the water gradually and grind it to a smooth and thick batter | Refrigerate the batter for 2 hrs | After 2 hrs, add salt, onions, green chilies, curry leaves to the batter and mix well | Take a banana leaf and wipe it with some water | Take a small amount of the batter and place it over the banana leaf and shape it (you can use water to help shape the vada) | Heat some oil for deep frying, slowly drop the vadas into the hot oil and deep fry them till they are golden brown in color (Maintain medium flame while frying the vadas) | Serve the Medu vada hot | You can buy our book and classes on http://www.21frames.in/shop | HAPPY COOKING WITH HOMECOOKING! | ENJOY OUR RECIPES

This traditional vada recipe is perfect for breakfast or tiffin and pairs well with coconut chutney and sambar. If you are looking for a medu vada recipe, South Indian breakfast or other easy Indian tiffin ideas, you are at the right place....https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BahH5aZqllg&list=PLFhw-Rie62rSUexCVEh96_HZv5CQkSs4l&pp=sAgC #MeduVada #CrispyMeduVada #VadaRecipes #SouthIndianVada #vada #homecooking #Garelu #uraddalvada #southindianbreakfast Here is the link to Amazon HomeCooking Store where I have curated products that I use and are similar to what I use for your reference and purchase https://www.amazon.in/shop/homecookingshow Prep time: 6 hrs Cook time: 30 mins Number of servings: 6-7 persons Ingredients Urad Dal - 1 cup (soaked) Water - about 1/4 cup Salt - 1/2 tsp Onion - 1 no. (finely chopped) Green Chili - 2 nos. (finely chopped) Curry Leaves Oil For Deep Frying Method Soak the urad dal for 4 hrs Strain the water and transfer the urad dal to a mixer jar. Add the water gradually and grind it to a smooth and thick batter Refrigerate the batter for 2 hrs After 2 hrs, add salt, onions, green chilies, curry leaves to the batter and mix well Take a banana leaf and wipe it with some water Take a small amount of the batter and place it over the banana leaf and shape it (you can use water to help shape the vada) Heat some oil for deep frying, slowly drop the vadas into the hot oil and deep fry them till they are golden brown in color (Maintain medium flame while frying the vadas) Serve the Medu vada hot You can buy our book and classes on http://www.21frames.in/shop HAPPY COOKING WITH HOMECOOKING! title: CHIA PUDDING » 6 Flavours for Easy, Healthy Breakfast Snacks | Spring/Summer Meal Prep
description: For a lower carb alternative to Overnight Oats, and for a super easy way to meal prep healthy & tasty snacks, breakfasts or desserts in minutes, try Chia Pudding! They're packed full of nutrients & keep me feeling full for hours - perfect as breakfast or a ready-to-eat snack that I can grab & go any time of the day. Here are 6 fun & tasty flavour recipes to try! -------------------- TIMESTAMPS: 0:00 - Intro
ingredients: ► Canned light coconut milk (1/2 cup, 125ml) | ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp, 15g) | ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp, 7.5ml) | ► Vanilla extract (1/2 tsp, 2g)
instructions: ► Mix ingredients in a jar | ► Let sit & settle for 5 mins, then stir again to remove any clumps | ► Cover with lid & refrigerate for at least 2+ hours | -------------------- | BASE PUDDING | 1 serving (110 calories): | ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp, 15g) | ► Milk (1/2 cup, 125ml) | ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp, 7.5ml) | ► Chia seeds (1/2 cup, 60g) | ► Milk (2 cups, 500ml) | ► Maple syrup (2 tbsp, 30ml) | When it's ready, you can eat the base pudding on its own, or top with fruits, berries, nuts, etc. | --------------------
raw_text: For a lower carb alternative to Overnight Oats, and for a super easy way to meal prep healthy & tasty snacks, breakfasts or desserts in minutes, try Chia Pudding! They're packed full of nutrients & keep me feeling full for hours - perfect as breakfast or a ready-to-eat snack that I can grab & go any time of the day. Here are 6 fun & tasty flavour recipes to try! -------------------- TIMESTAMPS: 0:00 - Intro 0:26 - What is chia pudding? 1:23 - Best containers for chia pudding 1:39 - Base recipe 3:45 - #1 - Mango Coconut 5:07 - #2 - Orange Creamsicle 6:04 - #3 - Very Berry 6:39 - #4 - Apple Pie 7:34 - #5 - Pumpkin Spice 8:16 - #6 - Chocolate Banana 8:51 - Outro -------------------- PRODUCT LINKS: Wide mouth mason jars (8-oz): https://amzn.to/41dyoLi Chia seeds: https://amzn.to/3Y2Hk5f Citrus juicer: https://amzn.to/3MHcmfy Mixing bowls: https://amzn.to/3KDKxSN Grater: https://amzn.to/43Jaklh Cutting board: https://amzn.to/406RNfx Measuring spoons: https://amzn.to/3mv6k6U Measuring cups: https://amzn.to/3oaohbB Blender: https://amzn.to/3GNvi8E Saucepan: https://amzn.to/3uIweZ7 CAMERA GEAR: Camera: https://amzn.to/3o5FtyF Lens #1: https://amzn.to/41pYwlJ Lens #2: https://amzn.to/418vyXM -------------------- NOTE: All recipes make 1 serving. Refrigerate for 2+ hours before eating. Freeze for 3-4 weeks, or keep in fridge for up to 5 days. DIRECTIONS (for all recipes): ► Mix ingredients in a jar ► Let sit & settle for 5 mins, then stir again to remove any clumps ► Cover with lid & refrigerate for at least 2+ hours -------------------- BASE PUDDING 1 serving (110 calories): ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp, 15g) ► Milk (1/2 cup, 125ml) ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp, 7.5ml) 4 servings: ► Chia seeds (1/2 cup, 60g) ► Milk (2 cups, 500ml) ► Maple syrup (2 tbsp, 30ml) When it's ready, you can eat the base pudding on its own, or top with fruits, berries, nuts, etc. -------------------- #1 - MANGO COCONUT (387 calories w/ toppings) Ingredients: ► Canned light coconut milk (1/2 cup, 125ml) ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp, 15g) ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp, 7.5ml) ► Vanilla extract (1/2 tsp, 2g) ► Ripe mango Toppings: ► Coconut flakes Directions: ► Mix ingredients & refrigerate ► When it's ready, peel mango cut into small chunks ► Place mango chunks into a blender and blend into puree. Save a few chunks to use as toppings ► In an empty jar, add alternating layers of chia pudding and puree ► Top with mango chunks & coconut flakes -------------------- #2 - ORANGE CREAMSICLE (204 calories w/ toppings) Ingredients: ► 3 mandarins, or 3 tbsp (45ml) of orange juice ► Canned light coconut milk (1/4 cup, 62ml) ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp, 15g) ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp, 7.5ml) ► Vanilla extract (1 tsp, 2g) Toppings: ► Coconut flakes ► Sliced mandarins ► Greek yogurt Directions: ► Squeeze 3 tbsp of juice ► Mix ingredients & refrigerate ► When it's ready, top with a spoonful of Greek yogurt, mandarin slices & coconut flakes ► Grate orange zest on top -------------------- #3 - VERY BERRY (151 calories w/ toppings) Ingredients: ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp, 15g) ► Milk (1/2 cup, 125ml) ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp, 7.5ml) ► Frozen berries (1/2 cup, 70g) Toppings: ► Berries ► Granola ► Hemp hearts Directions: ► Blend milk, maple syrup,& frozen berries until smooth ► Combine blended mixture w/ chia seeds in a jar, stir & refrigerate ► Add toppings -------------------- #4 - APPLE PIE (345 calories w/ toppings) Ingredients (pudding): ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp, 15g) ► Almond milk (1/2 cup, 125ml) ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp, 7.5ml) ► Apple sauce (1 tbsp, 15g) ► Cinnamon (1/4 tsp, 2.5g) Ingredients (apple chunks): ► Red apple (1 apple makes 2 servings) ► Coconut oil (2 tsp, 10g) ► Maple syrup (1 tbsp, 15ml) ► Cinnamon (1 tsp, 2.5g) Toppings: ► Cinnamon (pinch) ► Cinnamon stick (optional) Directions: ► Mix ingredients (for pudding) & refrigerate ► When it's ready, chop apple into small cubes ► Cook apple chunks, coconut oil, maple syrup, & cinnamon in a saucepan over medium heat for 4-5 mins until caramelized ► Add apple chunks on top of chia pudding & top with cinnamon -------------------- #5 - PUMPKIN SPICE (143 calories w/ toppings) Ingredients: ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp) ► Milk (1/2 cup) ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp) ► Pure pumpkin puree (2 tbsp, 31ml) ► Pumpkin pie spice (1 tsp, 1.5g) ► Vanilla extract (1/2 tsp, 2g) Toppings: ► Greek yogurt ► Cinnamon (pinch) ► Cinnamon stick (optional) Directions: ► Mix ingredients & refrigerate ► Add toppings -------------------- #6 - CHOCOLATE BANANA (344 calories w/ toppings) Ingredients: ► Chia seeds (2 tbsp) ► Almond milk (1/2 cup) ► Maple syrup (1.5 tsp) ► Cocoa powder (1 tbsp, 15g) ► Vanilla extract (1/2 tsp, 2g) ► Chocolate chips (1 tbsp, 15g) Toppings: ► Banana slices ► Chocolate chips ► Crushed almonds Directions: ► Mix ingredients & refrigerate ► Add toppings -------------------- NOTE: This contains affiliate links, which means I'll receive a small commission if you purchase through one of the product links.

title: 5-in-1 Breakfast Ideas!! | नाश्ते में बनाएं 5 तरह से चीला | Jini Dosa street style | Chef Ranveer
description: 5 TYPES OF CHEELA - Not one, not two, but here's solving your Mon-Fri Breakfast / snack time problems with these delicious 5 types of Cheela/ chilla recipes!! *********************** 🛒𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🛒 🛍️RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
ingredients: 2 cups Gram flour, बेसन | 3 tbsp Semolina, सूजी | ¼ tsp Black salt, काला नमक | ¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन | 1 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | 1 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी | ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही | Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार | 1 ½ tsp Oil, तेल | A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन | 1 tbsp Onion, finely chopped, प्याज | A pinch of chili flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स | ¼ tsp Oil, तेल | A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन | ½ tsp Oil, तेल | ¼ cup Processed cheese, grated, चीज | 1 tbsp Tomato, chopped, टमाटर | 1 tsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप | A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन | 1 tsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप | A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन | 1 small Tomato, sliced, टमाटर | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ tsp Oil, तेल | 2 tsp Green chutney, हरी चटनी | A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | 1 tbsp Spring onion, chopped, हरी प्याज | 1 tbsp Tomato, finely chopped, टमाटर | 1 ½ tbsp Onion, chopped, प्याज | ¼ cup Paneer, grated, पनीर | 2 tbsp Processed cheese, grated, चीज | ¼ tsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स | 1 tsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप | 1 tsp Green chutney, हरी चटनी
instructions: In a bowl, add gram flour, semolina, black salt, carom seeds, baking soda, oil, ginger garlic paste, saffron water, curd and mix it well. | Add water, salt to taste, oil and make a smooth batter. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Onion Chili Cheela | On a heated tawa, pour the batter into small batches. | Add onions, chili flakes, spring onion, drizzle some oil and cook it on both the sides on moderate heat. | Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander leaves. | For Cheese Cheela | On a heated tawa, pour prepared batter, drizzle some oil, add cheese, tomato, coriander leaves, tomato ketchup and cook it for a minute. | Fold it from the middle and transfer it to a serving dish. | Garnish it with tomato wedges and coriander sprig. | For Threaded Cheela | On a heated tawa, pour prepared mixture like thick thread or net, add chili flakes, coriander leaves and cook it on both the sides. | Fold it from the middle like roti or chapati. | Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with mayonnaise, tomato ketchup and coriander sprig. | For Cheela Sandwich | On a heated tawa, pour the prepared batter into small batches like pancakes, drizzle some oil, add tomato, salt to taste, coriander leaves and cook it on both the sides. | Add green chutney, cheese and place another cheela on top like a sandwich. | Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with cheese, spring onion and tomato ketchup. | For Jini Dosa Style Cheela | On a heated tawa, pour the prepared batter and make a dosa, drizzle some ghee, add spring onion, tomato, onion, coriander leaves, paneer, cheese, chili flakes, mayonnaise, tomato ketchup green chutney and cook it for a minute. | Roll it and cut into four equal parts. | Garnish it with mayonnaise, cheese and coriander sprig. | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ raw_text: 5 TYPES OF CHEELA - Not one, not two, but here's solving your Mon-Fri Breakfast / snack time problems with these delicious 5 types of Cheela/ chilla recipes!! *********************** 🛒𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🛒 🛍️RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Cheese Pav Bhaji - https://youtu.be/6w4TGuXYtgg Jumbo Sandwich - https://youtu.be/KdLvelT0R1A No Oven Veg Lasagna - https://youtu.be/exHOnbuudMY *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 5 TYPES OF CHEELA Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Batter 2 cups Gram flour, बेसन 3 tbsp Semolina, सूजी ¼ tsp Black salt, काला नमक ¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन 1 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा 1 tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार 1 ½ tsp Oil, तेल For Onion Chili Cheela A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन 1 tbsp Onion, finely chopped, प्याज A pinch of chili flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स few Spring onion, chopped, हरी प्याज ¼ tsp Oil, तेल For Cheese Cheela A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन ½ tsp Oil, तेल ¼ cup Processed cheese, grated, चीज 1 tbsp Tomato, chopped, टमाटर few Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप For Threaded Cheela A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन Chili flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स few Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़ 1 tsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप For Cheela Sandwich A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन 1 small Tomato, sliced, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार few Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ½ tsp Oil, तेल 2 tsp Green chutney, हरी चटनी Processed cheese, grated, चीज For Jini Dosa Style Cheela A ladle full of Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रन 1 tsp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Spring onion, chopped, हरी प्याज 1 tbsp Tomato, finely chopped, टमाटर 1 ½ tbsp Onion, chopped, प्याज few Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ cup Paneer, grated, पनीर 2 tbsp Processed cheese, grated, चीज ¼ tsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़ 1 tsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप 1 tsp Green chutney, हरी चटनी For Garnish Processed cheese, grated, चीज Spring onion, chopped, हरी प्याज Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Batter In a bowl, add gram flour, semolina, black salt, carom seeds, baking soda, oil, ginger garlic paste, saffron water, curd and mix it well. Add water, salt to taste, oil and make a smooth batter. Keep it aside for further use. For Onion Chili Cheela On a heated tawa, pour the batter into small batches. Add onions, chili flakes, spring onion, drizzle some oil and cook it on both the sides on moderate heat. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander leaves. Serve hot. For Cheese Cheela On a heated tawa, pour prepared batter, drizzle some oil, add cheese, tomato, coriander leaves, tomato ketchup and cook it for a minute. Fold it from the middle and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with tomato wedges and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Threaded Cheela On a heated tawa, pour prepared mixture like thick thread or net, add chili flakes, coriander leaves and cook it on both the sides. Fold it from the middle like roti or chapati. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with mayonnaise, tomato ketchup and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Cheela Sandwich On a heated tawa, pour the prepared batter into small batches like pancakes, drizzle some oil, add tomato, salt to taste, coriander leaves and cook it on both the sides. Add green chutney, cheese and place another cheela on top like a sandwich. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with cheese, spring onion and tomato ketchup. Serve hot. For Jini Dosa Style Cheela On a heated tawa, pour the prepared batter and make a dosa, drizzle some ghee, add spring onion, tomato, onion, coriander leaves, paneer, cheese, chili flakes, mayonnaise, tomato ketchup green chutney and cook it for a minute. Roll it and cut into four equal parts. Garnish it with mayonnaise, cheese and coriander sprig. Serve hot. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #cheelarecipe #besanchila #ranveerbrar #chillarecipe #jinidosa #pancake #dosa #stuffedchilla #cheesecheela

title: Instant Oats Rava Idli | ओट्स इडली बनाने की विधि | Rava Idli Recipe | South Indian Breakfast Recipe
description: Oats Rava Idli (ओट्स रवा इडली) OatsRavaIdli #BreakfastRecipe #MeghnasFoodMagic Oats are so beneficial to whoever wanting to follow health or weight loss journey. And there can’t be anything more healthy than Idli. You can even store the dry batter for future use. Bringing both together, enjoy Oats Rava Idli for breakfast, lunch, dinner…. practically any time. Ingredients :
ingredients: 1 cup Oats (powdered) | 1 tbs Oil | 1.5 tsp Skinless Lentils (Urad Dal) | 1.5 tsp Mustard Seeds (Rai) | Pinch of Asafoetida Powder (Hing) | 1 cup Semolina (Suji/Rava) | 1 cup Curd (Dahi) | 1/2 cup Water | Finely chopped Green Chillies (as per taste) | Salt as per taste | 1 tsp Fruit Salt (Eno)
instructions: Heat up the pan, add 1 tbs Oil | Add 1.5 tsp Skinless Lentils (Urad Dal) | Add 1.5 tsp Mustard Seeds (Rai) | Add few Curry Leaves | Add a pinch of Asafoetida Powder (Hing) | Add few roughly cut Cashews | Add 1 cup Semolina (Suji/Rava) | Roast for 5 min on medium heat | Turn off the heat and add Oats Powder | Mix it and transfer in a bowl | Add 1 cup Curd (Dahi) | Add 1/2 cup Water | Mix it and rest for 10-15 min | Further add some veggies, finely chopped Coriander, Green Chillies and shredded Carrot | Add Salt to taste & mix everything well | Add 1 tsp Fruit Salt (Eno) | (Before adding fruit salt keep idli moulds ready, greased with oil and keep the steamer heat on) | Fill batter in Idli moulds and place them into steamer | Cover the lid and steam for 15-20 mins | Take out the moulds and remove idlis from it | Enjoy Yummilicious Oats & Rava Idli with Sambar or Chutney | Love M #RavaIdli #OatsIdli #OatsRavaIdli #Idli #IdliRecipe #SoojiIdli #MeghnasFoodMagic #IndianFoodBloggers #newidea #healthyfood #healthyrecipes #indianfoodblogger #indianfoodies #HighFibreRecipe #FusionRecipes #ifoundawesome #mumbaieats #whatmumbaieats #mumbaifoodies #mumbaifoods #delhifoods #delhifoodies #goodfoodindia #southindianfood #southindianrecipes #SouthIndianFood #chennaifoodie ##bangalorefoodies #southindianfoodie | 00:00 - Making Oats and Rava Idli | 00:31 - Making Oats Flour | 00:49 - Good Tempering for Rava | 01:13 - Time to add Rava | 01:23 - Adding Oats Flour | 01:46 - Meghna's Tip on storing the Idli Mix | 02:05 - Adding Curd | 02:25 - Resting the Batter | 02:32 - Pre-Heating Steamer | 02:46 - Adding Veggies | 03:17 - Greasing the Moulds | 03:36 - Adding Fruit Salt | 03:50 - Steaming Idlis | 04:48 - Plating | 05:00 - Meghna Tastes Oats and Rava Idli | Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MeghnasFoodMagic/ | Twitter: https://twitter.com/meghnafoodmagic | Instagram: https://instagram.com/meghnasfoodmagic
